data.content: Plan complete. Adds acceptance (Option<String>) as a first-class knot field across all layers: v12 schema migration, KnotCacheRecord/UpsertKnotHot/KnotView structs, KnotAcceptanceSet event kind, --acceptance CLI flag on new/update, rehydration, sync, UI show, and prompt rendering. Follows existing description/body patterns exactly. Medium complexity, ~12 files, all mechanical. Knot-level acceptance renders separately from profile-level acceptance in prompts.
